untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'speculative activity/algorithmic adoption in market 40-60% of volume' and 'technical breakout signal generated' — neither can be directly computed from the allowed indicators. Speculative activity/algo adoption percentage is not measurable from price/volume data alone. A 'technical breakout' requires pattern recognition logic not available in the indicator set. Secondary confirmation signals (momentum divergence check) also lack a precise MACD or RSI divergence detector in the allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume surge (vol_ratio_20 >= 0.40) as a proxy for elevated algorithmic activity, but the core regime detection logic cannot be fully expressed. The signal is fundamentally about market structure and crowding detection, which requires external data or custom ML classification not derivable from standard technical indicators. Recommend: (1) Add custom indicator for algo adoption rate, (2) Implement pattern recognition for breakouts, (3) Add divergence detection operator, or (4) Use external data source for speculative activity estimates.
